weirdnessReasons: animal logistics signal: fish, fisheries, wildlife

items.plainEnglish: It reads like animal logistics inside a federal procurement record. It may be perfectly reasonable — the weird part is seeing it as an official line item.
items.displayTitle: Inflatable jet boat. Motor included. Democracy continues.
items.punchline: Somewhere in procurement, someone typed “inflatable shallow-water jet boat” and everyone just kept moving.
